beats.activity: Wake up, coffee, check weather and mood for the day ahead.
beats.reasoning: Saturday morning routine; energy is moderate (45/100 yesterday), so a gentle start. Overcast weather means no pressure for early outdoor plans—gives flexibility to the day.

beats.activity: Drive to Fremont Farmers Market to browse and photograph vendors.
beats.reasoning: Saturday ritual for a social butterfly; farmers market is walkable from home but driving allows camera gear. Fremont is his neighborhood and hosts a market today.

beats.activity: Browse vendors, chat with regulars, shoot film photos of the market atmosphere.
beats.reasoning: Low-energy Saturday morning; markets suit his social nature and love of photography. Overcast light is actually perfect for film work without harsh shadows.

beats.activity: Walk around Fremont, grab brunch at a local café, stay in neighborhood.
beats.location_name: Molly Moon's Homemade Ice Cream (Fremont, Seattle)
beats.reasoning: Staying local and unhurried; Molly Moon's is a known spot from recent days. Fremont vibe matches his mood—familiar, low-pressure Saturday energy.

beats.activity: Drive to Georgetown studio to check on the space and prep for a possible evening session.
beats.reasoning: Saturday work pattern; even on low-energy days, competitive Seattleites check their workspace. Georgetown is across town from Fremont, budget 40 min for drive.

beats.activity: Tidy studio, review client sketches, maybe work on a personal design piece.
beats.reasoning: Saturday admin and creative time; no back-to-back sessions scheduled, so this is self-directed studio work. Mood is reflective rather than high-energy.

beats.activity: Walk to a nearby café or lunch spot in Georgetown, grab a late lunch.
beats.reasoning: Salumi is a known decompression spot from recent days. Saturday afternoon, staying in the neighborhood near the studio. Light meal fits the pace.

beats.activity: Shoot film photos around Georgetown; capture the neighborhood light and texture.
beats.reasoning: Camera is always with him; overcast Saturday afternoon is perfect for film work. Solo photography time matches his reflective mood.

beats.activity: Drive home to Maple Leaf; skip the Mariners game (crowds, not his vibe today).
beats.reasoning: Low energy (45/100) means the SoDo crowds and 1pm game hold no appeal today. Heading home for an evening of leisure and recovery matches his mood.

beats.activity: Process film photos from the day, review negatives, work on a chess puzzle or online match.
beats.reasoning: Quiet Saturday evening; competitive nature satisfied by chess. Film development is meditative and fits his reflective state.

beats.activity: Prepare a simple dinner at home; eat while reviewing sketches or watching the light fade.
beats.reasoning: Solo dinner at home; values close time over crowds. Overcast evening means no stargazing, so domestic focus is natural.

beats.activity: Wind down: more chess online, read or listen to music, reflect on the week.
beats.reasoning: Extended wind-down before sleep; low-energy Saturday evening at home. No stargazing tonight due to overcast, so indoor leisure fits.
7 hours 15 minutes sleep, ending at 06:30 Sunday morning. Reasonable Saturday-night rest after a moderate-energy day.

world_event_prompt: Overcast Saturday, high of 64F. Farmers markets in Ballard, Fremont, and the U-District in full swing. Mariners home game at T-Mobile Park at 1pm brings SoDo crowds.
